title: Rusticl KGSL Compute Pipeline — Full API Success, GPU Dispatch Pending

remaining_blockers.description: clEnqueueNDRangeKernel returns success but IOCTL_KGSL_GPU_COMMAND is never called for compute context. Only init context (ctx=16) submits. Deferred submit mechanism doesn't flush compute commands.
remaining_blockers.evidence: KGSL_SUBMIT trace shows only ctx=16 init submit, no ctx=17 compute submit
remaining_blockers.root_cause_hypothesis: fd_pipe_sp_flush early-return (last_submit_fence >= fence) or threaded submit queue not draining for compute pipe

remaining_blockers.description: clEnqueueReadBuffer returns -5 (CL_OUT_OF_RESOURCES). Buffer data initialized via CL_MEM_COPY_HOST_PTR IS readable (verified in readback_test: out[0]=42), but formal ReadBuffer call returns error code -5.
remaining_blockers.evidence: readback_test shows data present but err=-5; compute test shows c[0]=-1 (buffer never written by GPU)
remaining_blockers.root_cause_hypothesis: Transfer path uses blit/copy which requires GPU submit (same blocker as above), or mmap/staging buffer issue

architecture_proven: pipe_loader_kgsl → fd_device_new_kgsl_direct → kgsl_pipe (flags=0x13) → ir3_compiler → fd6_screen_init → Rusticl Device(FD725)
next_steps: Debug deferred submit flush for compute pipe
Trace fd_pipe_sp_flush fence comparison for compute ctx
Check if threaded_submit=true prevents immediate flush
May need to disable threaded submit for KGSL or fix flush path
